SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, avg_consumption,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption) AS rn
        FROM (
            SELECT ym.CustomerID,
                   c.Segment,
                   SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
                   AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE rn = 1 AND Segment = 'SME'
    )) -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, avg_consumption,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption) AS rn
        FROM (
            SELECT ym.CustomerID,
                   c.Segment,
                   SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
                   AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE rn = 1 AND Segment = 'LAM'
    )) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, avg_consumption,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption) AS rn
        FROM (
            SELECT ym.CustomerID,
                   c.Segment,
                   SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
                   AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE rn = 1 AND Segment = 'LAM'
    )) -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, avg_consumption,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption) AS rn
        FROM (
            SELECT ym.CustomerID,
                   c.Segment,
                   SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
                   AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE rn = 1 AND Segment = 'KAM'
    )) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, avg_consumption,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption) AS rn
        FROM (
            SELECT ym.CustomerID,
                   c.Segment,
                   SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
                   AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE rn = 1 AND Segment = 'KAM'
    )) -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, avg_consumption,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption) AS rn
        FROM (
            SELECT ym.CustomerID,
                   c.Segment,
                   SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
                   AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE rn = 1 AND Segment = 'SME'
    )) AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT 'biggest' AS type, Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)=0
                THEN NULL
                ELSE (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
                      SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) *
                     100.0 /
                     SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
           END AS pct_increase
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) pct
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lowest' AS type, Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)=0
                THEN NULL
                ELSE (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
                      SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) *
                     100.0 /
                     SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
           END AS pct_increase
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) pct
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM (
    WITH user_posts AS (
        SELECT p.Id, p.Tags
        FROM posts p
        JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
        WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
          AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM comments c WHERE c.PostId = p.Id)
          AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL
    ),
    prepared AS (
        SELECT Id,
               REPLACE(REPLACE(Tags, '<', ''), '>', '') AS clean_tags
        FROM user_posts
    ),
    split_start AS (
        SELECT Id,
               REPLACE(clean_tags, '><', '|') AS taglist
        FROM prepared
    ),
    recursive_split(tag, rest) AS (
        SELECT
            CASE
                WHEN INSTR(taglist, '|') = 0 THEN taglist
                ELSE SUBSTR(taglist, 1, INSTR(taglist, '|') - 1)
            END,
            CASE
                WHEN INSTR(taglist, '|') = 0 THEN ''
                ELSE SUBSTR(taglist, INSTR(taglist, '|') + 1)
            END
        FROM split_start
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            CASE
                WHEN INSTR(rest, '|') = 0 THEN rest
                ELSE SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, '|') - 1)
            END,
            CASE
                WHEN INSTR(rest, '|') = 0 THEN ''
                ELSE SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, '|') + 1)
            END
        FROM recursive_split
        WHERE rest <> ''
    )
    SELECT tag
    FROM recursive_split
    WHERE tag <> ''
) AS tags
ORDER BY tag;	----- bird -----	codebase_community
